/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/d_States-jack.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/d_States-jack.dir/distrho/distrho/DistrhoPluginMain.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/d_States-jack.dir/distrho/distrho/DistrhoUIMain.cpp.o" -o bin/d_States  libd_States-dsp.a libd_States-ui.a -lSDL2 -lasound -lpulse-simple -lpulse libd_States.a libdgl-opengl.a -ldbus-1 /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/libGL.so -ldl
